name: SLOPE Development Roadmap
description: Forward-looking roadmap from S61+. Phases 1-9 (S1-S47) are complete. S48-S60 were hardening, guard enforcement, and process sprints. This roadmap covers adoption, observability, guard maturity, multi-project, and loop evolution.

sprints.theme: The Doctor — Repo Health Checks & Repair

tickets.title: slope doctor command — check .gitignore, config, hooks, guards
slope init --repair — fix missing/outdated config in existing repos
slope doctor --fix — auto-repair common issues (gitignore, hooks, guards)
Guard installation audit — detect missing guards and suggest additions

sprints.theme: The Welcome Mat v2 — Streamlined First-Run Experience

tickets.title: Auto-detect existing repo profile during init (stack, test runner, CI)
Recommend guards based on detected stack and workflow
slope init --migrate — upgrade config from older SLOPE versions
Post-init validation — run doctor checks after init to confirm setup

sprints.theme: The Handbook — CLI Help & Documentation Polish

tickets.title: slope help <command> — detailed usage, examples, and flags for each command
slope quickstart — interactive tutorial for new users
Guard documentation — explain each guard's purpose, triggers, and config
Handicap trend API — time-series data for handicap, GIR, fairway hit
Guard effectiveness metrics — track block/allow ratios per guard
Sprint velocity tracking — tickets/sprint, score trends, par accuracy
Dashboard widgets for new metrics — guard stats, velocity, trend charts
Token usage tracking per sprint — estimate from transcript data
Cost estimation — model-aware pricing for tracked token usage
slope cost — CLI report of token/cost trends across sprints
Enhanced transcript viewer — filter by tool, show timing, highlight errors
Session replay summary — auto-generate narrative of what happened
Compaction event tracking — log what was lost and recovered
Guard fire log — persistent record of every guard decision per session
Guard test harness — simulate PreToolUse/PostToolUse/Stop with fixtures
Guard snapshot testing — verify guard output stability across changes
Custom guard validation — check custom guards for common errors
Guard dry-run mode — show what guards would fire without blocking
Audit all advisory guards — identify which return context-only with no disk state
Convert hazard guard to write disk state for compaction survival
Convert scope-drift guard to write disk state for compaction survival
Guard enforcement report — slope doctor check for advisory vs mechanical guards
Cross-repo scorecard collection — aggregate from multiple .slope/ directories
Org-level handicap card — compute combined stats across repos
slope org status — show all repos, their handicaps, and active sprints
Cross-repo common-issues — promote patterns that appear in multiple repos

sprints.theme: The Foursome v2 — Multi-Agent Session Coordination

tickets.title: Session conflict detection across worktrees — real-time claim overlap alerts
Agent handoff protocol — structured session transfer between agents
Parallel sprint orchestration — coordinate multiple agents on independent tickets
Agent session dashboard — live view of all active agent sessions
Team sprint scoring — combine individual agent scores into team score
Inter-team leaderboard — compare team performance across orgs
Sprint retrospective generator — auto-generate retro from scorecard data

sprints.theme: The Autopilot v2 — Smart Model Routing

tickets.title: Model success rate tracking — per-club, per-ticket-type success data
Adaptive model selection — use historical data to pick optimal model per ticket
Model cost-performance tradeoff — factor cost into routing decisions
slope loop config recommend — suggest optimal model config from data

sprints.theme: The Assembly Line — Batch Sprint Execution

tickets.title: Dependency-aware sprint scheduling — respect depends_on in continuous mode
Parallel worktree management — auto-create/cleanup worktrees for parallel sprints
Sprint failure recovery — auto-retry with different strategy on failure
Batch execution report — summary of all sprints run in a batch
Backlog quality scoring — rate backlog tickets by likelihood of clean execution
Auto-generate backlog from common-issues and guard data
Convergence metrics — track handicap improvement rate, predict plateau
